headline: Uber (UBER) Expands Uber Eats Retail Reach With Foot Locker And 1,000 Stores
summary: Uber Technologies (NYSE:UBER) has partnered with Foot Locker, Kids Foot Locker, and Champs Sports to expand its Uber Eats retail marketplace. The agreement adds access to footwear, apparel, and accessories from more than 1,000 locations across the U.S. Customers can use Uber Eats for both on-demand and scheduled delivery of these retail products. Uber Technologies, trading at $72.46, is leaning further into retail delivery as it looks beyond its core ride hailing and restaurant segments...

headline: TechCrunch Mobility: The battle over robotaxi rules
summary: Welcome back to TechCrunch Mobility, your hub for the future of transportation and now, more than ever, how AI is playing a part.
